segment.source: An animated statistics grid in two, three, or four columns; each entry counts up to a target number on scroll and carries an optional prefix (e.g. $), suffix (%, K, M), and a required label, under an optional section heading. Use it for: key figures and milestones — customers served, years in business, projects completed, satisfaction percentages. Prefer 'KPI Cards' when values need trend arrows; 'Inline Stats Row' for a slim single-line strip.
